property.name: userMode
property.label: User Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Admin, Faculty.

property.name: modalTitle
property.label: Modal Title
property.description: Component modal title.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: attendanceTileIcon
property.label: Attendance Tile Icon Name
property.description: Attendance tile icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: attendanceButtonLabel
property.label: Attendance Button Label
property.description: The button label for opening the attendance registry table.

property.name: sevTileInfoFields
property.label: Attendance Tile Info Fields
property.description: The attendance tile info fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: studyEventTileClickAction
property.label: Attendance Tile Click Action
property.description: The action when clicking on attendance tile title. Supported options are: None, View Info, View Record.

property.name: infoModalFieldsForStudyEvent
property.label: Study Event Info Popup Fields
property.description: The study event info popup fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: infoModalSectionNameForStudyEvent
property.label: Study Event Info Section Name
property.description: The study event info popup section name.

property.name: showNoAttendanceWarning
property.label: Show No Attendance Warning
property.description: Show warning when no attendance is taken yet.

property.name: noAttendanceWarningText
property.label: No Attendance Warning Text
property.description: The warning for no attendance.

property.name: noAttendanceWarningIcon
property.label: No Attendance Warning Icon
property.description: The icon name for no attendance. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: noAttendanceWarningIconVariant
property.label: No Attendance Icon Warning Icon Variant
property.description: The icon variant/colour for no attendance.

property.name: validFacultyIsnStatus
property.label: Faculty Individual Session Enrollment Statuses
property.description: (Only applies to Study Sessions) Displays listings if the Faculty user has these statuses. For multiple statuses, separate each one with ; e.g. Enrolled;Completed. The status should match the reduivy__Enrollment_Status__c picklist option API value.

property.name: attendanceStatuses
property.label: Attendance Status Options
property.description: The attendance status to be displayed in the attendance registry table e.g., Attended;Absent;Late. The status should match the reduivy__Attendance_Status__c picklist option API value.

property.name: studyEventRelationEditFieldSetName
property.label: Attendance Note Field Set Name
property.description: The study event relation field set API name for attendance notes.

property.name: contactTileInfoFields
property.label: Contact Tile Info Fields
property.description: The contact tile info fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: contactImageUrlFieldName
property.label: Contact Image Url Field Name
property.description: The contact field API name that stores the image url. This will take precendence if this and Contact Image File Name is defined.

property.name: contactImageFileName
property.label: Contact Image File Name
property.description: The text to find the contact profile image file name using CONTAINS.

property.name: contactTileClickAction
property.label: Contact Tile Click Action
property.description: The action when clicking on contact tile title. Supported options are: None, View Info, View Record.

property.name: infoModalFieldsForContact
property.label: Contact Info Popup Fields
property.description: The contact info popup fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: infoModalSectionNameForContact
property.label: Contact Info Section Name
property.description: The contact info popup section name.

property.name: infoModalFieldsForIndividualSessionEnrollment
property.label: Individual Session Enrollment Popup Fields
property.description: The individual session enrollment info popup fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: infoModalSectionNameForIndividualSessionEnrollment
property.label: Individual Session Enrollment Info Section Name
property.description: The individual session enrollment info popup section name.

property.name: showRecordsBasedOnAllocation
property.label: Show Records Based On Allocation
property.description: After enabling this checkbox, the wizard will display the study sessions and study events based on the faculty's allocation which is the study event relation for faculty's individual session enrollment

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: ID of the salesforce record for which the record details are to be displayed e.g. {!recordId}

property.name: userMode
property.label: User Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Admin, Faculty.

property.name: modalTitle
property.label: Modal Title
property.description: Component modal title.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: attendanceTileIcon
property.label: Attendance Tile Icon Name
property.description: Attendance tile icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: attendanceButtonLabel
property.label: Attendance Button Label
property.description: The button label for opening the attendance registry table.

property.name: sevTileInfoFields
property.label: Attendance Tile Info Fields
property.description: The attendance tile info fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: studyEventTileClickAction
property.label: Attendance Tile Click Action
property.description: The action when clicking on attendance tile title. Supported options are: None, View Info, View Record.

property.name: infoModalFieldsForStudyEvent
property.label: Study Event Info Popup Fields
property.description: The study event info popup fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: infoModalSectionNameForStudyEvent
property.label: Study Event Info Section Name
property.description: The study event info popup section name.

property.name: showNoAttendanceWarning
property.label: Show No Attendance Warning
property.description: Show warning when no attendance is taken yet.

property.name: noAttendanceWarningText
property.label: No Attendance Warning Text
property.description: The warning for no attendance.

property.name: noAttendanceWarningIcon
property.label: No Attendance Warning Icon
property.description: The icon name for no attendance. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: noAttendanceWarningIconVariant
property.label: No Attendance Icon Warning Icon Variant
property.description: The icon variant/colour for no attendance.

property.name: validFacultyIsnStatus
property.label: Faculty Individual Session Enrollment Statuses
property.description: (Only applies to Study Sessions) Displays listings if the Faculty user has these statuses. For multiple statuses, separate each one with ; e.g. Enrolled;Completed. The status should match the reduivy__Enrollment_Status__c picklist option API value.

property.name: attendanceStatuses
property.label: Attendance Status Options
property.description: The attendance status to be displayed in the attendance registry table e.g., Attended;Absent;Late. The status should match the reduivy__Attendance_Status__c picklist option API value.

property.name: studyEventRelationEditFieldSetName
property.label: Attendance Note Field Set Name
property.description: The study event relation field set API name for attendance notes.

property.name: contactTileInfoFields
property.label: Contact Tile Info Fields
property.description: The contact tile info fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: contactImageUrlFieldName
property.label: Contact Image Url Field Name
property.description: The contact field API name that stores the image url. This will take precendence if this and Contact Image File Name is defined.

property.name: contactImageFileName
property.label: Contact Image File Name
property.description: The text to find the contact profile image file name using CONTAINS.

property.name: contactTileClickAction
property.label: Contact Tile Click Action
property.description: The action when clicking on contact tile title. Supported options are: None, View Info, View Record.

property.name: infoModalFieldsForContact
property.label: Contact Info Popup Fields
property.description: The contact info popup fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: infoModalSectionNameForContact
property.label: Contact Info Section Name
property.description: The contact info popup section name.

property.name: infoModalFieldsForIndividualSessionEnrollment
property.label: Individual Session Enrollment Popup Fields
property.description: The individual session enrollment info popup fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: infoModalSectionNameForIndividualSessionEnrollment
property.label: Individual Session Enrollment Info Section Name
property.description: The individual session enrollment info popup section name.

property.name: showRecordsBasedOnAllocation
property.label: Show Records Based On Allocation
property.description: After enabling this checkbox, the wizard will display the study sessions and study events based on the faculty's allocation which is the study event relation for faculty's individual session enrollment

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.
